list.name: US Equity Security Master
list.shortDescription: Corporate action data source for splits, dividends, mergers, acquisitions, IPOs, and delistings.

list.name: US Futures Security Master
list.shortDescription: Rolling reference data for popular CME Futures contracts.

examples.init: var future = AddFuture(Futures.Indices.SP500EMini, dataMappingMode: DataMappingMode.OpenInterest, dataNormalizationMode: DataNormalizationMode.BackwardsRatio, contractDepthOffset: 0);
examples.research-history: var history = qb.History<SymbolChangedEvent>(future.Symbol, new DateTime(2023, 1, 1), new DateTime(2025, 1, 1));

list.name: US Equity Coarse Universe
list.shortDescription: Universe of all US Equities with closing price and volume for Coarse Universe Selection.

list.name: US ETF Constituents
list.shortDescription: Equity constituent components and weightings for US ETF listings. This data is ideal for universe selection without selection bias.

list.name: International Future Universe
list.shortDescription: FESX, HSI, and NKD Futures universe for fast future contract selection with prices, expiration dates and open interests

examples.universe-filter: _future.SetFilter(0, 90);
examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.History<FutureUniverse>(future.Symbol, new DateTime(2025, 1, 1), new DateTime(2025, 4, 1));

list.name: US Future Option Universe
list.shortDescription: Future Options universe for fast option contract selection.

examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.History<OptionUniverse>(QuantConnect.Symbol.CreateCanonicalOption(future.Mapped), new DateTime(2020, 6, 1), new DateTime(2020, 6, 6));

list.name: US Future Universe
list.shortDescription: Futures universe for fast future contract selection with prices, expiration dates and open interests

examples.universe-filter: _future.SetFilter((universe) => universe.StandardsOnly().FrontMonth());
examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.History<FutureUniverse>(future.Symbol, new DateTime(2025, 1, 1), new DateTime(2025, 4, 1));

list.name: US Equity Option Universe
list.shortDescription: Precalculated daily greeks for fast option-contract selection.

examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.History<OptionUniverse>(option.Symbol, new DateTime(2020, 6, 1), new DateTime(2020, 6, 6));

list.name: US Index Option Universe
list.shortDescription: Precalculated Daily Greeks for Fast Option Selection

examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.History<OptionUniverse>(option.Symbol, new DateTime(2020, 6, 1), new DateTime(2020, 6, 6));

list.name: US Equities Short Availability
list.shortDescription: Available shares for open short positions in the US Equity market.

list.name: US Fundamental Data
list.shortDescription: Corporate Fundamental data for fine universe selection based on industry classification and underlying company performance indicators.

examples.research-history: var history = qb.GetFundamental(equity.Symbol, "ValuationRatios.PERatio", new DateTime(2021, 1, 1), new DateTime(2021, 7, 1));

list.name: US Equities
list.shortDescription: Market data for all US listed and delisted Equities, ETFs, ETNs, ADRs, and Warrants.

list.name: US Equity Options
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for US Equity Options contracts.

list.name: US Futures
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the most liquid US Futures across the CME, CBOT, NYMEX, and COMEX markets.

examples.universe-history: var history = History(new[] { _futureSymbol }, start: Time - TimeSpan.FromDays(15), end: Time, resolution: Resolution.Minute, fillForward: false, extendedMarketHours: false, dataMappingMode: DataMappingMode.OpenInterest, dataNormalizationMode: DataNormalizationMode.Raw, contractDepthOffset: 0);
examples.universe-filter: future.SetFilter(0, 90);
examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.FutureHistory(future.Symbol, new DateTime(2020, 6, 1), new DateTime(2020, 6, 5));

list.name: US Future Options
list.shortDescription: Future Options data for the most liquid US CME Future commodity contracts.

examples.universe-filter: universe => universe.Strikes(-5, +5)
examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.OptionHistory(futureContractSymbol, startDate, futureContractSymbol.ID.Date, Resolution.Hour);

list.name: US Index Options
list.shortDescription: European Option contract data for 3 US Indices: SPX, VIX, and NDX.

examples.universe-filter: option.SetFilter(-2, 2, 0, 90);
examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.OptionHistory(option.Symbol, new DateTime(2020, 6, 1), new DateTime(2020, 6, 5));

list.name: International Futures
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for FESX, HSI, and NKD Future Contracts.

examples.universe-history: var history = History(new[] { _future.Symbol }, start: Time - TimeSpan.FromDays(15), end: Time, resolution: Resolution.Minute, fillForward: false, extendedMarketHours: false, dataMappingMode: DataMappingMode.OpenInterest, dataNormalizationMode: DataNormalizationMode.Raw, contractDepthOffset: 0);
examples.universe-filter: _future.SetFilter(0, 90);
examples.research-universe-history: var history = qb.FutureHistory(future.Symbol, new DateTime(2020, 6, 1), new DateTime(2020, 6, 5));

list.name: Benzinga News Feed
list.shortDescription: Financial articles and news publications condensed into a news feed with titles and article bodies for sentiment analysis

list.name: Tiingo News Feed
list.shortDescription: News releases from 120 different news providers for sentiment analysis.

list.name: Upcoming Earnings
list.shortDescription: Alert for upcoming earnings report of US Equities with report date, report time, and earnings estimation.

list.name: Upcoming IPOs
list.shortDescription: Alert for upcoming IPO events of primary US Equities with IPO start/filing/amended date, IPO deal type. IPO prices, and number of shares.

list.name: Upcoming Splits
list.shortDescription: Alert for upcoming split and reverse split events of primary US Equities common shares with split date, and split factor.

list.name: Economic Events
list.shortDescription: Alert for upcoming economic events globally, including the date and estimates of macroeconomic indicator annoucement, special dates, etc.

list.name: US Congress Trading
list.shortDescription: Trading activity of Congresspeople for potential insider trading signals based on early access to regulation changes.

list.name: Corporate Buybacks
list.shortDescription: US Equity buyback announcements and transactions scraped from SEC reports and secondary sources.

list.name: US Regulatory Alerts - Financial Sector
list.shortDescription: RegAlytics is the leading provider of daily regulatory updates. They source data from over 5,000 regulators.

list.name: Brain Sentiment Indicator
list.shortDescription: Proprietary sentiment analysis algorithm for US Equities.

list.name: Brain ML Stock Ranking
list.shortDescription: Proprietary machine learning ranking algorithm for US Equities.

list.name: Brain Language Metrics on Company Filings
list.shortDescription: Proprietary NLP algorithm that monitors several language metrics on company reports.

list.name: Estimize
list.shortDescription: Estimates of company financials including EPS, revenues, and macroeconomic indicators based on 100,000+ crowdsourced predictions.

list.name: True Beats
list.shortDescription: Predictions of EPS and Revenues for US Equities based on expert opinions, peer opinions, and historical performance.

list.name: Tactical
list.shortDescription: Likelihood score of short-term price movements driven by technical indicators.

list.name: Cross Asset Model
list.shortDescription: Scoring algorithm based on put-call spread of Equity Options, volatility skewness, and volume.

list.name: Composite Factor Bundle
list.shortDescription: Daily proprietary signals for quality, value, momentum, growth, and low volatility factors, which are used by the leading quant funds.

list.name: CNBC Trading
list.shortDescription: CNBC Trading tracks the recommendations made by media personalities on CNBC.

list.name: US Government Contracts
list.shortDescription: Use the USASpending.gov API to track government contracts granted to publicly traded companies.

list.name: Corporate Lobbying
list.shortDescription: Lobbying activities of companies to political or legislative figures, including clients, issues concerned, and amount paid.

list.name: Insider Trading
list.shortDescription: Insider Trading tracks trades made by the own company executives, implying if they were bullish or bearish on their own companies.

list.name: Brain Wikipedia Page Views
list.shortDescription: Tracks investor attention toward large U.S. equities by monitoring traffic on company Wikipedia pages.

list.name: US SEC Filings
list.shortDescription: Semi-parsed Quarterly Financial Reports (10-Q) and Annual Financial Report (8-K) filings of companies for US Equities.

list.name: US Federal Reserve (FRED)
list.shortDescription: Collection of thousands of economic datasets maintained by the US Government.

list.name: Data Link
list.shortDescription: Nasdaq Data Link, previously known as Quandl, is a premier marketplace for financial, economic, and alternative data sets.

list.name: Bybit Crypto Price Data
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the Bybit Crypto exchange, collected by CoinAPI.

list.name: Bybit Crypto Future Price Data
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the Bybit Crypto Future exchanges, collected by CoinAPI.

list.name: Bybit Crypto Future Margin Rate Data
list.shortDescription: Margin interest rate data for the Bybit Crypto Future exchanges, collected by QuantConnect.

list.name: Fear and Greed
list.shortDescription: A daily index between 0 and 100, representing the degree of fear or greed in the US Equity market.

list.name: FOREX Data
list.shortDescription: Quote data for Forex pairs.

list.name: CFD Data
list.shortDescription: Quote data for Contracts for Difference (CFD).

list.name: Coinbase Crypto Price Data
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the Coinbase Pro Crypto exchange, collected by CoinAPI.

list.name: Bitfinex Crypto Price Data
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the Bitfinex Crypto exchange, collected by CoinAPI.

list.name: Binance Crypto Price Data
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the Binance Crypto exchange, collected by CoinAPI.

list.name: Kraken Crypto Price Data
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the Kraken Crypto exchange, collected by CoinAPI.

list.name: Binance US Crypto Price Data
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the Binance US Crypto exchange, collected by CoinAPI.

list.name: Binance Crypto Future Price Data
list.shortDescription: Trade and quote data for the Binance Crypto Future exchanges, collected by CoinAPI.

list.name: Binance Crypto Future Margin Rate Data
list.shortDescription: Margin interest rate data for the Binance Crypto Future exchanges, collected by QuantConnect.

list.name: US Interest Rate
list.shortDescription: Primary credit rate from the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC)

list.name: Macroeconomics Indicators
list.shortDescription: 39 Macroeconomic Indicators data for 249 countries/regions, including the date, value, and frequency.

list.name: Upcoming Dividends
list.shortDescription: Alert for upcoming dividend events of primary US Equities common shares with dividend important dates, and dividend per share.

list.name: US Energy Information Administration (EIA)
list.shortDescription: Supply and demand information for US Crude Products.

list.name: US Treasury Yield Curve
list.shortDescription: Yield curve rates for US Government bonds over all common maturity dates. The data is scraped from the US Treasury website.

list.name: VIX Central Contango
list.shortDescription: Contango rates over time for the VIX Contract. The data is provided by VIXCentral and cached by QuantConnect.

list.name: Cash Indices
list.shortDescription: Price data for 125 US Cash indices and 2 international indices (HSI and SX5E). This data provides the underlying price for Index Options of NDX, SPX, RUT, and VIX.

list.name: Bitcoin Metadata
list.shortDescription: Bitcoin processing fundamental data such as hash rate, miner revenue, and number of transactions.

list.name: Crypto Market Cap
list.shortDescription: Cryptocurrencies market cap data is provided by CoinGecko and cached by QuantConnect.

list.name: USDA Fruit And Vegetables
list.shortDescription: Retail price estimates for 75+ commonly consumed fresh and processed fruits and vegetables

examples.history: var history = History<USDAFruitAndVegetables>(_usdaApples, new DateTime(2013, 1, 1), Time, Resolution.Daily);
examples.research-history: var history = qb.History<USDAFruitAndVegetables>(usdaApples, new DateTime(2013, 1, 1), qb.Time, Resolution.Daily);

list.name: US Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS)
list.shortDescription: Statistical results of many surveys conducted and released by the US government.
